title: pilosella piloselloides subsp. litoralis
intro: Pilosella piloselloides subsp. litoralis, also known as the coastal hawk's-beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. The health benefits of Pilosella piloselloides subsp. litoralis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve immune function, and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
